hero.headline: MUJ Online MBA in Digital Marketing: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved Super/Dual specialization. 12 spec subjects in Sem 3-4. NAAC A+, NIRF #58.

sections.tldr: MUJ Online MBA in Digital Marketing covers SEO, social media marketing, content marketing, web analytics, SEM, email marketing, and digital marketing strategy for professionals targeting digital marketing leadership roles. NAAC A+, NIRF #58 at Rs 1,53,000 upfront (15% off) or Rs 1,80,000. Super/Dual spec — pair Digital Marketing with Marketing or Analytics. Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (70% off). Best for digital marketing managers targeting Head of Digital or CMO digital track roles.

about.body:
Digital Marketing is the MBA specialization for professionals who build and manage digital customer acquisition, engagement, and conversion channels: SEO specialists, social media managers, performance marketing executives, and content strategists who want to move into Digital Marketing Head, CMO digital track, or growth leadership roles. The MUJ Online MBA in Digital Marketing covers the full digital marketing stack as a management specialization: SEO, social media strategy, content marketing, digital design, web analytics, SEM, email marketing, and digital strategy.

MUJ's Super/Dual specialization is a strategic advantage for digital marketers. Pairing Digital Marketing with Marketing creates a full-funnel brand and performance credential — covering both traditional brand strategy and digital execution. Pairing with Analytics and Data Science builds a data-driven growth marketing profile for senior roles at e-commerce and D2C companies. Both combinations are in demand at digital-first brands and marketing agencies.

The Coursera Plus bundle at Rs 3,999 gives Digital Marketing students access to Google Digital Marketing, Meta Social Media Marketing, and HubSpot Marketing courses from global platforms — practical certifications that directly complement the MUJ curriculum.

Manipal University Jaipur Online is NAAC A+ accredited with NIRF #58 University ranking for 2025. EdifyEdu verifies accreditation data independently and does not receive commission from MUJ. Full programme overview at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Digital business strategy, platform competition, and aligning digital marketing investment with business objectives.

sem3Subjects.name: Term Paper
sem3Subjects.description: Independent research paper applying digital marketing theory to a real-world brand or campaign challenge.

sem3Subjects.name: Search Engine Optimization
sem3Subjects.description: On-page and technical SEO, keyword research, link building strategy, and organic search performance management.

sem3Subjects.name: Social Media Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Platform strategy across Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube, content calendar management, and community building.

sem3Subjects.name: Content Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Content strategy, editorial planning, long-form and short-form content production, and SEO content integration.

sem3Subjects.name: Digital Design
sem3Subjects.description: Visual communication principles, basic design for digital assets, brand consistency guidelines, and creative brief management.

sem4Subjects.name: International Business Management
sem4Subjects.description: Global digital marketing strategy, localisation for international markets, and cross-border campaign management.

sem4Subjects.name: Project
sem4Subjects.description: Major dissertation applying digital marketing specialization to an original applied brand or campaign study.

sem4Subjects.name: Web Analytics
sem4Subjects.description: Google Analytics implementation, traffic analysis, conversion funnel measurement, and digital performance reporting.

sem4Subjects.name: Search Engine Marketing
sem4Subjects.description: Google Ads campaign management, bidding strategy, quality score optimisation, and paid search ROI measurement.

sem4Subjects.name: E-mail Marketing
sem4Subjects.description: Email list management, segmentation, automation workflows, deliverability optimisation, and email campaign analytics.

sem4Subjects.name: Digital Marketing Strategy
sem4Subjects.description: Integrated digital strategy development, budget allocation, channel mix optimisation, and digital transformation planning.

syllabus.note: Semester 1 and 2 subjects are shared across all MUJ Online MBA specializations. Full programme structure at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

whoHires.body:
Digital Marketing MBA graduates from Manipal University Jaipur Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** E-commerce, D2C brands, Digital agencies, FMCG digital marketing functions, EdTech

**Entry-level roles:** Digital Marketing Executive, SEO Analyst, Performance Marketing Analyst, Social Media Manager

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Digital Marketing Manager, Head of SEO, Performance Marketing Manager, Growth Manager, Content Strategy Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Digital Marketing, Chief Marketing Officer, Head of Growth, Director of Digital, Chief Digital Officer

**Top hiring organisations:** Flipkart, Amazon India, Swiggy, Zomato, Nykaa, boAt, Mensa Brands, GroupM, Dentsu Digital, Isobar India

skills.body:
The Digital Marketing specialization builds skills that e-commerce, D2C, and agency employers test at digital marketing manager and growth leadership levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Performance Marketing: Google Ads and Meta Ads campaign management, attribution modelling, ROAS optimisation, and media budget allocation
- SEO Strategy: technical SEO audit, content gap analysis, backlink strategy, and organic traffic growth planning
- Web Analytics: GA4 implementation, funnel analysis, cohort reporting, and building executive-level digital performance dashboards
- Email and CRM Marketing: segmentation strategy, automation workflow design, A/B testing for email campaigns, and list health management

**Applied skills:**
- Digital Strategy: integrated digital channel planning, customer acquisition cost modelling, and lifetime value maximisation strategy
- Content and Social Strategy: content calendar management, influencer brief creation, and social media crisis management

**Soft skills:** Presenting digital ROI to CMOs and non-digital stakeholders, managing agency relationships, translating business growth targets into digital channel KPIs for performance teams.

comparisons.body:
Comparing MUJ Online MBA Digital Marketing against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Digital Marketing Management:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 at Rs 2,25,000. Amity covers digital marketing alongside broader marketing management. MUJ Digital Marketing is dedicated to digital channels with specific subjects on SEM, email marketing, and web analytics. MUJ's Super/Dual spec option (pairing with Analytics) creates a data-driven digital marketing profile. MUJ's Rs 1,53,000 upfront fee is significantly lower.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA:** NMIMS does not offer a dedicated Digital Marketing specialization in its online MBA. NMIMS Marketing Management covers digital marketing as one of seven Sem 3-4 subjects. For professionals specifically targeting digital marketing leadership, MUJ's dedicated spec with 12 digital-specific subjects is more relevant.

**vs LPU Online MBA Digital Marketing:** LPU is NAAC A++ at competitive fees. LPU covers digital marketing in depth. MUJ's Super/Dual spec flexibility (Digital Marketing plus Analytics creates a measurably stronger credential for data-driven digital roles) and Coursera Plus access at Rs 3,999 (Google Digital Marketing and Meta Social Media certifications) are clear differentiators.

fees.body:
The total program fee for the Manipal University Jaipur Online MBA in Digital Marketing can be paid through 2 options:

**Option 1 — Semester-wise payment**: Rs 45,000 per semester, Rs 1,80,000 total across 4 semesters
**Option 2 — Full upfront payment (discounted)**: Rs 1,53,000 one-time (Rs 1,80,000 standard less 15 percent fee concession)

A one-time registration fee of Rs 500 applies at enrolment. MUJ does not charge separate exam fees per attempt, project evaluation fees, or admission processing fees beyond this.

For working professionals, MUJ offers a 24-month zero-cost EMI plan at approximately Rs 7,500 per month on the standard fee (Rs 6,375 per month on the discounted fee) through its NBFC lending partners.

**Scholarships available** (non-stackable — pick one based on eligibility):
- **Divyaang** (persons with disabilities): 20% discount with Divyaang certificate
- **Defence personnel**: 20% discount with Service/IC number
- **Manipal University Jaipur alumni** (UG or PG): 20% discount
- **Government employees**: 10% discount with Govt ID
- **Merit scholarship**: 10% discount for 80%+ marks in 10+2 or bachelor's

**Coursera Plus bundled access** (MUJ differentiator): Enrolled MUJ students get Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (standard Rs 13,999 — a 70 percent discount). This includes 10,000+ courses from University of Virginia, University of Michigan, Johns Hopkins, University of California Irvine, and other top global universities.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees and scholarships with Manipal University Jaipur each quarter. Please reconfirm current offers and eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The Manipal University Jaipur degree certificate carries the Manipal University Jaipur name, the MBA designation, and identifies the online learning mode per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The Digital Marketing specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode identification on the certificate is standard for UGC-DEB approved programmes and equivalent in recognition to regular MBA degrees for employment, promotions, and further studies.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from MUJ Online MBA Digital Marketing alumni. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Shreya Gupta
items.liked: SEO, SEM, and web analytics content was directly applicable — I implemented GA4 dashboards from the analytics module immediately at work
items.disliked: Programmatic advertising and influencer marketing content was absent — both critical for senior digital marketing roles today
items.body: I paired Digital Marketing with Analytics and Data Science for a data-driven marketing profile. The SEO, Google Ads, and web analytics subjects gave me tools I use daily. The Coursera Plus access allowed me to complete Google's Digital Marketing and E-commerce certificate at Rs 3,999 total — listed on my LinkedIn and verified by my employer. The Manipal brand opened doors at Nykaa and Amazon India's marketing teams.

items.name: Nikhil Sharma
items.liked: Email marketing and content strategy subjects were thorough and practically oriented
items.disliked: Proctored exam browser extension blocked my ad blocker, causing confusion during setup. More clarity in pre-exam instructions needed
items.body: I work in performance marketing at a D2C brand. The Google Ads, email marketing, and digital strategy subjects were the most applicable. Pairing with Marketing gave me a full-funnel brand strategy credential that senior digital roles increasingly require. The Coursera Plus Meta Social Media Marketing certificate was useful for my Instagram ads work. MUJ degree accepted without issues in my promotion review.

items.name: Tanvi Mehta
items.liked: Social media marketing and content marketing subjects gave good frameworks for planning and measuring social campaigns
items.disliked: Career services were not useful for digital marketing roles. No agency or tech company connections and job board had no relevant postings
items.body: The digital marketing content itself was solid — all six Sem 3 subjects were practical and applicable. My frustration was career support. Digital marketing is a highly active hiring market and I expected some structured job connections. Instead, placement support was generic and offline-focused. All my interviews came through LinkedIn and direct applications. Good credential but do not join for placement assistance.

faqs.question: Can I choose dual specialization with the MUJ Online MBA in Digital Marketing?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Super/Dual model allows you to pair Digital Marketing with a second specialization at no extra cost. The strongest combinations: Digital Marketing plus Marketing (full-funnel brand and performance credential for CMO track roles), Digital Marketing plus Analytics and Data Science (data-driven growth marketing for e-commerce and D2C), or Digital Marketing plus International Business (for global digital campaign roles). Both specializations appear on your marksheet.

faqs.question: Is Coursera Plus access included or charged separately?
faqs.answer: Coursera Plus is available to enrolled MUJ students at Rs 3,999 per year (standard Rs 13,999 — 70% off). For Digital Marketing students, the most relevant offerings include Google Digital Marketing and E-commerce Professional Certificate, Meta Social Media Marketing Professional Certificate, and HubSpot Inbound Marketing. At Rs 3,999, these certifications are essentially free compared to direct enrollment prices.

faqs.question: What scholarships are available for the MUJ Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Five scholarship categories: 20% for Divyaang individuals, 20% for Defence personnel, 20% for MUJ alumni, 10% for Government employees, and 10% merit scholarship for 80%+ marks. Non-stackable. Plus: upfront payment of the full fee gets a 15% fee concession — Rs 1,80,000 becomes Rs 1,53,000.

faqs.question: What salary can Digital Marketing MBA graduates from MUJ expect?
faqs.answer: Digital marketing managers and performance marketing managers with 3-5 years of experience and this MBA earn Rs 10-18 lakh at e-commerce and D2C companies. Head of Digital and growth managers earn Rs 15-28 lakh. CMO and Chief Digital Officer roles pay Rs 25-50 lakh. Outcomes depend heavily on platform specialization (Google vs Meta vs SEO), company type (startup vs MNC), and whether the candidate supplements the MBA with Google, Meta, or HubSpot certifications.

faqs.question: Is the MUJ Digital Marketing MBA more relevant than a standalone digital marketing certificate?
faqs.answer: Both serve different purposes. A Google Ads or Meta certification validates specific platform expertise for execution roles. The MBA provides management credentials, business strategy context, and a formal degree — required for VP Digital, CMO, and Director-level positions that hire managers rather than specialists. For professionals already executing digital marketing and targeting leadership, the MBA is the right credential. For early-career roles, platform certifications (accessible cheaply via Coursera Plus) are sufficient.

chooseIf: You are a digital marketing professional targeting Head of Digital, Performance Marketing Director, or CMO track roles and want a dedicated 12-subject digital MBA under Rs 1.8 lakh.
You want to pair Digital Marketing with Analytics or Marketing for a data-driven or full-funnel marketing credential using MUJ's Super/Dual spec.
You value Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 for Google, Meta, and HubSpot digital certifications that directly complement the MUJ digital marketing curriculum.
consider: You are targeting marketing leadership at large FMCG or consumer goods companies where NMIMS Marketing or MICA's PGDM-C carries stronger brand recognition than MUJ.
You need purely technical digital marketing depth for a specialist role — standalone Google Ads or Meta certification programmes are faster and cheaper for execution-level roles.
You need active digital sector placement support — MUJ online career services do not maintain connections with agencies, e-commerce companies, or D2C brands.
